top_signals.title: CO2TIME 2026 published – a dedicated time charter party for liquefied CO₂ transport
top_signals.summary: We have published CO2TIME 2026, a new time charter party developed specifically for the maritime transport of liquefied carbon dioxide (LCO₂). The form responds to the rapid development of carbon capture, utilisation and storage (CCUS) projects and the growing need for a standardised contractual framework tailored to CO₂ shipping. CO2TIME 2026 is the first charter ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: BIMCO and Panama Maritime Chamber sign MoU
top_signals.summary: During the Maritime Convention of the Americas, the two organisations signed a Memorandum of Understanding. The agreement covers mutual cooperation and in particular support and collaboration for BIMCO’s events and maritime training courses held in Panama and in the wider Latin American region. In the picture: René Gómez, President of the Panama Maritime Chamber and ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: How to derisk ship retrofits: design, execution. and verification
top_signals.summary: Regulatory developments, fuelcost pressures, and maturing technologies are reshaping the retrofit landscape. This interview looks at technical effectiveness, cost recovery, design accuracy, and the projectmanagement factors critical to successful upgrades. ‘’Hyoung-Seog Kim, Head of Marine Solution Business Division, Hanwha Power Systems and Head of Commercial Ship Engineering and Technology, Hanwha Ocean’’ HyoungSeog Kim is a ...
